subject: Sports
title: VAR: Video Review in Football
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on VAR: Video Review in Football.

hook.text: A referee checks a screen, draws a line, and overturns a goal. Millions cheer or rage simultaneously.

buildup.text: VAR—Video Assistant Referee—was introduced to football to correct 'clear and obvious errors' in real time.

discovery.text: FIFA adopted VAR for the 2018 World Cup after trials showed it corrected 99.3% of reviewed decisions.

twist.text: Fans hate the delays. Offside lines are drawn to the millimeter, disallowing goals by a toenail's width.

climax.text: VAR improved accuracy but changed the emotional experience. Celebrations now come with nervous pauses.

punchline.text: More accuracy, less joy. VAR fixed decisions but broke celebrations.

quiz.question: What is the main criticism of VAR in football?
options: It causes delays and removes the spontaneity of goal celebrations
It makes incorrect decisions more often
It is too expensive for smaller leagues
